verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus Jesus You're the answer To all I'm searching for Jesus Jesus there's no question You're what my heart is longing for

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're my hope You're my strength You're my peace in the stormy sea You're my life my very source My guiding light wherever I may go

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: BRIDGE You're what my heart is longing for
